staticCommands.name: minify
staticCommands.description: Minify the publish package(delete the packages which not hosted in nuget)

options.description: merge all dlls in current dir
copy files to output dir, default is appsettings.json. support wildcard: *.exe;appsettings.json, separated by semicolon
enable symbol file generation
sets the key, but don't sign the assembly
output directory. default is ./nustored
exclude dlls, support regex. separated by semicolon for mutiple
specify target assembly kind (dll, exe, winexe supported, default is same as first assembly)
adds the path to the search directories for referenced assemblies (can be specified multiple times), separated by semicolon
show detailed log

staticCommands.name: restore
staticCommands.description: restore the packages declared in deps file

options.description: x64/x86, by default this value is resolved from platform attribute which declared in deps file
deps file. default is *.deps.json in current directory
directory packages stored (typically at /usr/local/share/dotnet/store on macOS/Linux and C:/Program Files/dotnet/store on Windows)
skip packages, support regex. separated by semicolon for mutiple
restore files directly onto path/package.dll instead of restoring in nested folders (eg. path/x64/netcoreapp2.0/package/1.2.0/lib/netcoreapp2.0/package.dll)
override existing packages, default is false
set nuget resource api url. default: https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json
.net core runtime version, the defaut value set by deps file, for example netcoreapp2.0/netcoreapp2.1
restore special packages, support regex. separated by semicolon for mutiple
show detailed log
yes to all confirm
